data.name: Two Beasts Or Not To Beast!
data.detailed_description:
With the day filled with abundant temptations, can you resist the seductresses around you and impress your crush, or will you give in to their flirtations? This furry lovers’ dating sim dream is about to begin!

“Our goal? To create the greatest, pervy furry porn game of all time, that only a doujin group could ever hope to accomplish! But that is no easy task, and the expectations are sky high.” - Toki no Kogiri

Haruki's crush is coming over for a study date on Sunday. Obviously he wants everything to go off without a hitch, so he intends to spend his whole Saturday preparing for her upcoming visit.

But his new roommate, Anne, has other plans in mind. Her goal is to toy with Haruki as much as possible, and she knows full well that she can do that with ease. And she's not the only one with malicious plans. His landlady, Madoka, is just as prepared to make some advances of her own, and she's positive her temptations will prove irresistible.

Escaping the apartment won't help either—as everywhere Haruki goes, there's a horny woman who seems to want nothing more than to get into his pants!

Haruki's resolve will be put to the test, and the day has only just begun...

  • Classic dating sim gameplay, with map movement and time management.

  • A plethora of choices, with over 10 unique heroines to mingle and get sexy with! 

  • 10+ hours of gameplay with 30+ fully uncensored, and animated sex scenes.

  • Art by DANGAN, plus an all-star cast of guest character artists including: Oki, Mabo, Sindoll, Kiichi, Kame, Kikunoya, INAX, 7010, ro, Suurin, Yo-na, Ohakotome, Suigi, and Toki!

  • Minigames galore!

  • Multiple endings influenced by your actions. Everyone wants your cock, so don't hesitate to let your lust get the best of you. Or go for a perfect score and ensure you'll have the best study date of all time!

Above all… this is a game made by furry lovers, for our like-minded furry lovers.

A laidback guy who just wants to enjoy life. He's having a hard time adjusting to life living on his own now that he’s in college; why do his new landlady and roommate have to be so attractive?!

Also taking up his attention is his crush, and he has the perfect opportunity to impress her with their upcoming study date. Haruki's got a whole day to prep to make sure it goes perfectly, but he has a long list of things to do, and there'll be plenty of distractions along the way...

Haruki's new roommate. A fun-loving chick with a banging body. She loves to fuck, and she's always on the prowl for a cock to satisfy her needs. She's close to Haruki in age, but in terms of experience, she's on another level. Though they've only been living in the same apartment for a month, she's already bored of just teasing him, and now it's time for the fruits of her lusty labor to finally pay off.

Haruki's new live-in landlady. At a glance, she seems like your average, goodhearted housewife. However, her true nature is anything but. She's a carnivore who preys on and devours men. The primary reason she and her previous husband divorced is because he couldn't keep up with her. Unsurprisingly, she wants a piece of Haruki as well, and she'll use her stacked body and tempting antics to make him sweat like he never has before.
